name: Panel Magazine
description: Magazine-style public theme with a fixed identity panel, banner masthead, and quiet secondary navigation.

settings_schema.label: Identity panel position
settings_schema.help: Places the fixed identity and navigation panel on the left or right on wide screens.

settings_schema.label: Compact header
settings_schema.help: Controls the compact header used on smaller screens; the wide-screen identity panel remains fixed.

settings_schema.label: Opposite sidebar
settings_schema.help: Shows or hides content assigned to the opposite sidebar.

settings_schema.label: Page list position
settings_schema.help: Places published page navigation in the fixed identity panel or the opposite sidebar on wide screens. Smaller screens use the Browse panel.

settings_schema.label: Primary navigation
settings_schema.help: Controls whether the configured primary navigation appears in the identity panel.

settings_schema.label: Footer menu position
settings_schema.help: Controls whether the configured footer menu is rendered by this theme.

settings_schema.label: Root start page
settings_schema.help: Controls whether the public root space starts on the aggregated post list or a published static page.

settings_schema.label: Root landing page path
settings_schema.help: Used when `Static page` is selected. Choose one of the published root pages.

settings_schema.label: Content width
settings_schema.help: Bounds the public content area using tinymash width presets.

settings_schema.label: Post list layout
settings_schema.help: Controls whether blog post lists use a lead-story magazine composition or a simple chronological stream.

settings_schema.label: Publication title style
settings_schema.help: Controls the type style for site identity and publication titles. Body text, navigation and controls remain sans-serif.

settings_schema.label: Public search
settings_schema.help: Controls whether public search is shown when the Search plugin is active.

settings_schema.label: Show tags
settings_schema.help: Controls whether entry tags are shown publicly when tags are enabled sitewide.

settings_schema.label: Enable syntax highlighting
settings_schema.help: Uses local highlight.js assets for fenced code blocks in this theme.

settings_schema.label: Page list style
settings_schema.help: Controls how published page navigation is displayed in its selected location.

settings_schema.label: Fallback navigation depth
settings_schema.help: Used for fallback page navigation in the identity panel when no primary menu is configured.

settings_schema.label: Page breadcrumbs
settings_schema.help: Controls whether page breadcrumb trails are shown above page content.

settings_schema.label: After-content child pages
settings_schema.help: Controls whether published child pages are listed after page content.

settings_schema.label: Short summary format for posts
settings_schema.help: Controls what post lists show when a post has no explicit summary.

settings_schema.label: Short summary words
settings_schema.help: Used when `Short summary` is selected. Invalid values fall back to 40.
